title: Teaspoons Set of 24, 6 inch Stainless Steel Tea Spoons, Food grade Cutlery Spoons Set for Tea, Coffee, Use for Home, Kitchen, Restaurant, Dishwasher Safe
features: 【Good Value】 Our teaspoons set contains 24 spoons, more cost-effective than 12 piece dessert spoons, which can perfectly replace the spoons lost in daily life.Our teaspoons is multifunctional, which can be used as tea spoons, coffee spoons, latte spoon and so on. If you’re looking for an inexpensive spoons set, our set is really suitable for you. And If you need forks set, you can buy it in our store, we also has forks set.

【Healthy Material】 Made of food grade stainless steel, each of our stainless steel spoons is non-toxic and nickel free, which will ensure your eating health. The spoons set is rust-resistant and not bend easily thanks to the durable stainless steel. It’s a great alternative to the plastic spoons.

【Ergonomics Design】 Our teaspoons set of 24 have a nice weight and size, which is perfect for both adult and children. Proper gauge thickness and length ensure enough grip. These teaspoons are ergonomically design to be comfortable to hold no matter what you’re eating.

【Dishwasher Safe】 Clean and looking and mirror polish makes these spoons always keep shining. And the 24 piece spoons is dishwasher safe, and you can just put them in a dishwasher for saving time in hand washing.

【Risk-free Purchase】 Don’t worrying about buying the spoons set you don’t like. Because we provide a 90-day money back guarantee. If you're not completely satisfied simply, please let us know anytime and we will offer a prompt refund or replacement, customer satisfaction is always our priority.
